auth_login_subtitle: Sign in to keep your training focused and competition-ready.
auth_register_subtitle: Set up your athlete profile and sync your training history.
auth_forgot_password_message: Enter your email and we will send a reset link.
auth_email_verification_message: Check your inbox and confirm your email before entering the app.
auth_reset_password_message: Paste the action code from the email and set a new password.
home_subtitle: Quick access to timer, scoring and accessibility settings.
home_timer_subtitle: Configure countdown rules for 3 or 6 arrows.
home_register_end_subtitle: Capture arrows and metrics directly from the shooting line.
home_spotter_subtitle: Let another person register your end with accessible flow.
home_history_subtitle: Review sessions, averages, X count and ten count.
home_accessibility_subtitle: Adjust contrast, timer assistance and multimodal feedback.
home_profile_subtitle: Update your athlete identity, language and unit preferences.
timer_accessibility_description: Adds 10 extra seconds for each arrow.
training_spotter_description: Use this screen when someone else is recording the end for the athlete.
accessibility_high_contrast_description: Increase color contrast and visual separation.
accessibility_timer_mode_description: Adds extra time to each arrow according to the rules.
accessibility_announcements_subtitle: Announce important changes like timer completion.
accessibility_haptic_subtitle: Support time-critical actions with vibration feedback.
profile_name_subtitle: This name is shown in your athlete profile.
profile_email_subtitle: Your sign-in email comes from Firebase Authentication.
profile_language_subtitle: Choose the app language for navigation and scoring screens.
profile_unit_subtitle: Define how field distances are represented.
